arms.B0: plain lexical cosine over the parent snapshot candidate universe
arms.B1: Roam clone/sibling strength only (W95/W855/W136-like clone pool)
arms.B2: graph sibling-only pool: W95/W855/W856/W857/W136/cochange, ranked without repair intent
arms.T: same B2 pool, reranked by repair applicability then graph strength
